description.unified: Deals Magic Damage to an enemy and restores HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. [ (added) For 6 sec, reduces the target's Attack by 20% and] [increases own ATK by 4% for 15sec->increases your Attack by 10%]. The Attack increase effect stacks up to [6->5] times.

Moves to the [rearmost->farthest] enemy and deals Magic Damage to the target and nearby enemies, increasing [Magic DMG taken by 20% and reduces Status Resistance by 320 for 5sec->their Magic Damage taken by 35% for 5 sec]. [(added) If enemies remain nearby after using the skill, additionally uses [Absorbing Strike].]
Deals Magic Damage 4 times to enemies within range. You cannot be affected by status ailments while casting, and all damage taken is reduced by [60%->50%].

When an enemy is killed, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and [Harvest] is stacked 1 times. [Harvest]: [ (added) For 12 sec,] Attack increases by [80*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))->80(1+0.3Skill Level)], stacking up to 10 times.

dark.unified: Mana cost is [increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 3 sec->Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is [reduced by 1000->Damage increases by 50%].

dark.unified: Mana cost is [increased by 1000, but damage is increased by 80%->Mana cost increases by 2000, but after using a skill, if there are nearby enemies, additionally uses [Absorbing Blow]].

light.unified: DMG is [increased by 40%->reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled].

dark.unified: Mana cost is [increased by 2000->increased by 1000], but [Harvest] is triggered once.

light.unified: Mana recovery per second is increased by [ {1}%->50%] per stack.

dark.unified: If stacks are [6->5] or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.

When [attacking->hitting] with a skill, [increases Epis’s Attack by 4% and Armor Penetration by 4%->reduces the target's Magic Defense by 6% and increases your Attack by 6% for 10 sec]. This effect stacks up to [5->6] times.

description.unified: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to [5->10] times.
